title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Gradeup Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Gradeup Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gradeup Ventures Solutions family as a Curriculum Developer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gradeup Ventures Solutions:
Gradeup Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
